Morgan, cert rotation is due Friday, and the order is fussy because of caching. So, um, generate the new cert first with the acme client, then upload it to the secrets manager, then — here's the part people miss — you update the load balancer to reference the new cert but you do NOT delete the old one yet, then you bounce the edge nodes one at a time so nothing drops, then after all nodes are on the new cert and you've confirmed, then and only then delete the old cert. Deleting the old one early takes down anything still holding a connection to it.

Morgan, cert rotation is due Friday and the order is fussy because of caching:
1. Generate the new cert with the ACME client.
2. Upload it to the secrets manager.
3. Update the load balancer to reference the new cert, but do not delete the old one yet.
4. Bounce the edge nodes one at a time so nothing drops.
5. Only after every node is on the new cert and confirmed, delete the old cert.
